expectations.text: Anchors on a target CPA / unit economics (LTV:CAC) before recommending spend
expectations.evidence: Step 0 is unit economics / target CAC before spend.

expectations.text: Flags prerequisites: conversion tracking installed and a landing page that converts, before launching
expectations.evidence: Step 1 requires the funnel to convert and tracking installed first.

expectations.text: Chooses a channel by buyer intent (search = capture existing demand vs paid social = create demand)
expectations.evidence: Chooses channel by intent (search vs social).

expectations.text: Recommends starting with one channel/focus rather than several at once
No fabricated benchmark numbers stated as fact; estimates are flagged as estimates
expectations.evidence: Numbers are illustrative, not fabricated as fact.
